case_title: CREEL PRINTING AND PUBLISHING CO. VS. HALF WIT WINES

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HALF WIT WINES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREEL PRINTING AND PUBLISHING CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALF WIT WINES $1,559.75 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,759.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,814.75 AS TO DEFENDANT HALF WIT WINES

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREEL PRINTING AND PUBLISHING CO. AS TO DEFENDANT HALF WIT WINES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
